what_went_well: TypeScript compiles cleanly with zero errors (before and after audit fixes)
No new test failures introduced — 6 pre-existing failures remain unchanged (223/229 pass)
No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or .env files with real values
Proper signal handling (SIGTERM/SIGINT) with graceful shutdown
Good separation of concerns: batch.ts is self-contained with clear module boundaries
Worker count config (actions.ts + TUI) integrates cleanly with existing monitor
Singleton lock pattern prevents duplicate batch instances
runtime-logger.js fix for findRepoRoot is correct and prevents duplicated log paths
what_went_wrong: Critical logic bug: workerLoop released failed tasks back to 'pending' when stopOnFailure=false, causing potential infinite retry loops — FIXED by auditor
Unused imports (openSync, closeSync, fstatSync) left in batch.ts — FIXED by auditor
findRepoRoot used join(dir, '..') instead of dirname(dir), inconsistent with runtime-logger.js fix — FIXED by auditor
No unit tests for batch.ts (852 lines of new code with 0 tests)
'todo' status not in TaskStatus union — requires (state.status as string) cast workaround
claimTask atomicity is weaker than spec promises — uses writeFileSync + existsSync pattern instead of true O_EXCL, creating a TOCTOU window
cmdHeadless shutdown handler doesn't clean up worktrees (only cancels tasks + releases lock)
dist/ files are committed but not rebuilt after coder changes — source and dist are out of sync
stop command in foundry.ts still uses pkill instead of lock-file PID-based SIGTERM (spec deviation)
improvement_suggestions: Add 'todo' to TaskStatus union in task-state-v2.ts to eliminate unsafe casts
Write unit tests for WorkerPool, claimTask, promoteNextTodoToPending, cmdBatch arg parsing (spec tasks 1.2, 2.2, 3.3)
Use proper-lockfile npm package or fs.open with O_EXCL flag for truly atomic task claiming
Rebuild dist/ files after source changes to keep them in sync
Add worktree cleanup to cmdHeadless shutdown handler (parity with cmdBatch)
Update stop command to read batch lock PID and send SIGTERM instead of pkill
deviations_from_spec: Spec task 1.1: claimTask/releaseTask/promoteNextTodo implemented in batch.ts instead of task-state-v2.ts as specified
Spec task 2.1: createWorktreeFromMain implemented inline in batch.ts instead of extending git.ts
Spec task 4.2: supervisor.ts not updated to use TS-native worker management
Spec: stop command still uses pkill instead of lock-file PID-based SIGTERM
Spec: cancelInProgressTasks always marks as 'cancelled', doesn't check if all agents are done (simplified from spec)

fixes_applied_detail: batch.ts: Removed unused imports (openSync, closeSync, fstatSync)
batch.ts: Fixed releaseTask-on-failure bug — failed tasks now stay failed instead of being re-queued
batch.ts: Fixed findRepoRoot to use dirname() instead of join(dir, '..')
